# Free Delivery Untaxed

This module allows to determine if a shipping is free based on the untaxed price of the SO instead of the taxed price.

## Installation

To install this module, you need to:

1. Just intall the module

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go to Website > Configuration > Shipping Methods
2. Choose a shipping method
3. Check "Use amount untaxed" if the decision of free shipping has to be based on untaxed amount.

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. No instructions needed.
